title: Cynoctonum nummulariifolium

intro: Cynoctonum nummulariifolium, also known as Chinese silvergrass or nummular-leaved cynoctonum, is a type of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its numerous health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory properties, which are said to help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Cynoctonum nummulariifolium include flavonoids, saponins, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is commonly prepared into teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in the manufacture of herbal capsules and tinctures.
